description: Behavioral flag system for /implement — each flag activates a verifiable mode

tesla.description: Tesla mental laboratory method: build entire solution in consciousness space before writing a single line
tesla.short: Build in mind first. Dwell until crystallized. Exit when inevitable.
verification: Solution was fully designed in extended thinking before first file write
Multi-dimensional analysis evident: problem examined from 5+ angles
No premature implementation — design phase is complete before code phase begins

noFallbacks.description: Zero fallback tolerance: every code path is the real path, no graceful degradation where correctness is required
noFallbacks.short: Every fragment complete. No shells. No stubs. No escape hatches.
verification: Zero instances of: except pass, TODO, FIXME, NotImplementedError, unimplemented!()
No default/fallback return values where real data is expected
Every match/switch arm handles its case with real logic
Error paths propagate errors — they do not swallow them

robust.description: Edge case obsession: every boundary condition, every error path, every malformed input handled and tested
robust.short: Difficulties catalyze enhancement. Every edge is a feature.
verification: Empty/null/zero inputs handled explicitly
Boundary values tested (min, max, off-by-one)
Malformed/adversarial input produces clear errors, not crashes
Concurrent access patterns considered where applicable
Resource cleanup guaranteed (files closed, connections returned)

verbose.description: Transparent reasoning: cite algorithms, show derivations, explain tradeoffs in code comments and output
verbose.short: Make the invisible visible. Every decision has a trail.
verification: Every non-trivial algorithm cites its source (paper, equation number)
Every magic constant has a derivation comment
Tradeoff decisions documented where alternatives existed
Claude reports reasoning steps at each major milestone

complex.description: Full complexity honor: implement the real algorithm from the source, not a textbook simplification
complex.short: Maintain superposition of all solution paths. Don't collapse prematurely.
verification: Algorithm matches source publication exactly (equation numbers in comments)
No 'simplified for clarity' reductions applied
Full parameter space preserved — no hardcoded special cases
Numerical precision matches or exceeds source requirements

sophisticated.description: Highest technique available: advanced type systems, algebraic data types, property-based testing, formal methods where applicable
sophisticated.short: Improve the improvement process. Highest craft the language permits.
verification: Type system leveraged to make invalid states unrepresentable
Newtypes/branded types used for domain concepts (not raw primitives)
Property-based testing where algorithm has provable invariants
Error types are algebraic (enum variants), not string messages
